title: Drinking Alone Under the Moon
description: Li Bai raises his cup to the moon and his shadow, making three companions where there was one — the most beloved poem in Chinese.
introduction: Li Bai raises his cup to the moon and his shadow, making three companions where there was one — the most beloved poem in Chinese.

translation.original_text: 花間一壺酒，獨酌無相親。舉杯邀明月，對影成三人。
translation.text: Among the flowers, a jug of wine — I drink alone, no friend at hand. I raise my cup to invite the bright moon; with my shadow we make three.
